claim_bullets.bullet_text: Although we showed how to use tail calls to map and fold over arrays with [first, ...rest] , in reality this is not how it ought to be done. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.131-131)
But it is an extremely simple illustration of how recursion works when you have a self-similar means of constructing a data structure. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.131-131)

source_record_text: JavaScript Allongé explores fundamental and advanced JavaScript concepts, including logical operators, control flow mechanisms, and linear recursion.
